name: Projectionist
description: Plays preroll videos before movies AND TV episodes. Folder-based source — no Jellyfin library required (auto-creates a hidden internal one). Schedules, per-library rules, per-user rules, maturity gating, cooldowns, skippable prerolls, stats dashboard.
overview: Folder-based prerolls with episode support, schedules, and rich smart-selection.

versions.changelog: Adds split movie/TV session behaviour, Warm/Hot preload modes, dashboard sidebar access, improved episode preroll handling, and admin UI fixes.
Fixes: maturity gate no longer wrongly excludes untagged prerolls; library tile is now actually hidden from the home screen (CSS + MutationObserver client-side hider).
